summary: Critical gaps: (1) Workflow violates explicit SHA-pinning requirement—actions/checkout@v4 and actions/upload-artifact@v4 must pin to 40-char commit SHAs. (2) Missing test files: workflow references tests/Aggregate-TestResults.Tests.ps1 (doesn't exist). (3) No fixtures: task requires sample JUnit/JSON test files; none provided. (4) No validation: missing actionlint run output and act-result.txt artifact. (5) No TDD evidence: task requires failing-test-first; only finished script shown. PowerShell code itself is strong (Set-StrictMode, -LiteralPath, wrapped arrays, schema-agnostic parsing, defensive error handling) but deliverable fails to meet requirements for a shippable artifact.
